zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barker於1563年出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親John Barker23歲，母親Margaret Mawle22歲。他於1585年6月28日與Margaret Walter在英國素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年3月在英國素福爾可納易藍德享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barker于1563年出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲John Barker23岁，母亲Margaret Mawle22岁。他于1585年6月28日与Margaret Walter在英国素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年3月在英国素福爾可納易藍德享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Barker was born in 1563, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, John Barker, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Mawle, was 22. He married Margaret Walter on 28 June 1585, in Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in March 1617, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barker est né en 1563, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Barker, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mawle, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Walter le 28 juin 1585, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en mars 1617, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barker 1563 in Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Barker 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Mawle 22. Er hat am 28. Juni 1585 in Nayland, Suffolk, England Margaret Walter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im März 1617 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker è nato il nel 1563 nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Barker, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mawle, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Walter il 28 giugno 1585, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel marzo 1617, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barkerが1563年にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父John Barkerは23歳，母Margaret Mawleは22歳であった。1585年6月28日にイギリススフォルクナイランドでMargaret Walterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年3月にイギリススフォルクナイランドで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barker(이)가 1563년 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barker(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mawle(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1585년 6월 28일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 Margaret Walter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 3월 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barker nasceu em 1563, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Barker, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mawle, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Walter em 28 de junho de 1585, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em março de 1617, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barker родился в 1563 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Barker было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mawle, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Walter 28 июня 1585 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер марта 1617 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Barker nació en 1563, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Barker, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Mawle, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Walter el 28 de junio de 1585, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en marzo de 1617, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
